{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Sword
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Flowing [[Sword]] is a weapon [[Enforcer technique]] utilized by [[Yerin]]. This specialized method allows her to collect both [[madra]] and [[sword aura]] through continuous combat, causing the weapon to grow increasingly powerful with every thrust and slash. As the technique is maintained, the blade begins to glow—often appearing as a silver star or a bonfire of energy—and its strength can escalate to the level of a [[Truegold]]'s weapon. The technique is highly effective for offensive combat and can be applied to her primary blade as well as her various [[sword]]-arms. Because it is an [[Enforcer technique]], it remains functional even within a [[Hollow Domain]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Flowing Sword]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] that collects [[aura]] with every slash and thrust.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Flowing Sword]] is a technique that makes a blade shine like a silver star and carries power like a [[Truegold]]'s weapon.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Flowing Sword]] is a technique [[Yerin]] used to make her blade glow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Flowing Sword]] is [[Yerin]]'s weapon [[Enforcement]] technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] used her [[Flowing Sword]] against Sophara's chest.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] can form the [[Flowing Sword]] around her weapon using [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] used her [[Flowing Sword]] to catch the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s claw.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
